name: ai-analyst-plugin
description: AI-powered product analytics: ask a business question, get validated findings, publication-quality charts, and a slide deck.

knowledge_repo_url.title: Knowledge Repo URL
knowledge_repo_url.description: GitHub repo URL for knowledge base (SSH or HTTPS). Leave empty to use local path instead.

knowledge_local_path.title: Knowledge Local Path
knowledge_local_path.description: Local directory path to knowledge base (for testing). Used when repo URL is empty.

knowledge_datasets.title: Dataset IDs
knowledge_datasets.description: Comma-separated dataset IDs to index (e.g., traya-health)

aws_profile.title: AWS Profile
aws_profile.description: AWS profile name for Athena access

athena_s3_staging.title: Athena S3 Staging
athena_s3_staging.description: S3 path for Athena query results (e.g., s3://bucket/athena-output/)
